message:
fix(ci): strip Windows UNC prefix in e2e_cli config/file_ref tests

Add canon() helper that wraps fs::canonicalize + strip_unc_prefix to
fix three Windows test failures where expected paths contained \\?\
prefix but CLI output did not:
- e2e_cli_config_paths_fallback_to_agent_dir
- e2e_cli_config_paths_honor_env_overrides
- e2e_cli_print_mode_file_ref_reads_file

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
